basic_details.short_information: National Highways Authority of India has released the official Advisor Notification 2026 at NHAI Official Website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the NHAI Advisor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 65 years with a Degree in Electrical Engineering or Electrical and Electronics Engineering and relevant retired service experience at Chief Engineer level or above can apply online up to 09-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.details: Degree in Electrical Engineering or Electrical and Electronics Engineering from a recognized University/ Institute. Retired from Central/ State Government/ PSU/IIT/ Institute at the level equivalent to Chief Engineer or above. Experience in laying, operation and maintenance of electrical lines and sub-stations in Public Sector Undertaking or State Power Utilities.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NHAI Advisor Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NHAI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NHAI Advisor (Utility) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NHAI Advisor (Utility) post is 09 June 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Advisor (Utility) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Electrical Engineering or Electrical and Electronics Engineering from a recognized University/Institute and have retired from a relevant senior position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Advisor (Utility) position is 65 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Advisor (Utility) role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Advisor (Utility) post has a maximum ceiling of Rs. 2,35,000/-.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Advisor (Utility) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the post of Advisor (Utility) in NHAI.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for this NHAI recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this NHAI recruitment is entirely online.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for a Contractual position.

faq.question: Q9. What kind of experience is required for the Advisor (Utility) role?
faq.answer: Experience in laying, operation, and maintenance of electrical lines and sub-stations in Public Sector Undertaking or State Power Utilities is required.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article.
